name: Chez Melange Dipping Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-large saucepan, combine the anchovies and olive oil. Simmer on low heat for 12 to 15 minutes, or until the anchovies have dissolved.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the dissolved anchovies and oil in the saucepan. Stir well to combine.
3. Simmer the mixture over low heat for 1 hour.
4. Serve the sauce in a bowl with freshly baked bread. Enjoy!
